meta.title: BlockMiner — Mine POL, Play Games, Earn Rewards | blockminer.space
meta.description: Free Web3 mining game on Polygon: build your farm, grow hashrate, play mini-games, daily check-ins, and earn real POL. Join a live community. Not financial advice.

hero.subheadline_before: The mining game where you build your farm, buy machines, and earn
hero.visual_caption: Simulated mining farm — your dashboard after signup

how.title: Start mining in three simple steps
how.subtitle: From zero to hashrate in minutes.
how.step1_body: Sign up free in under a minute. No credit card — your dashboard is ready instantly.
how.step2_body: Buy rigs in the Shop, play games for temporary boosts, check in daily, and complete faucet & shortlink tasks.
how.step3_body: POL-style rewards follow your share of the live block engine. Withdraw to your wallet when you meet the minimum.

features.title: Why players choose us
features.subtitle: Real server-side rounds, transparent stats, and more than passive clicking.
features.f1_body: Play for free. Earn balance and hashrate through gameplay, check-ins, and tasks — optional shop purchases use in-game POL only.
features.f2_body: The economy is wired for Polygon (POL). Link your wallet when you are ready for deposits and withdrawals.
features.f3_body: Memory Sync and Power Match grant temporary hashrate — fun breaks that actually move your rewards.
features.f4_body: Check in, faucet, YouTube rewards, and Auto Mining GPU keep progression fresh every day.
features.f5_body: Invite friends with your link and grow the network — share rewards as your crew levels up.
features.f6_body: Request on-chain withdrawals when you pass platform minimums. Processing follows our wallet rules.

calculator.title: Calculate potential POL earnings
calculator.subtitle: Uses the same block reward model as our public calculator (0.15 POL per block, ~10 min). Network size is estimated from live player data.
calculator.network_note: Estimated network: scales with active rigs on the platform.
calculator.usd_note: USD is illustrative (example POL price). Not a quote.
calculator.disclaimer: Estimates only. Actual rewards depend on network hashrate, rounds, and rules. Not financial advice.
calculator.cta: Start with this power — create account

community.title: Join our growing community
community.subtitle: Numbers update from the live game server.

testimonials.title: What miners say
testimonials.disclaimer: Illustrative quotes for marketing; experiences vary.
testimonials.t1_text: I use BlockMiner between classes — the check-in and games actually add up. Withdrew POL to MetaMask without drama.
testimonials.t2_text: Finally a mining game that explains hashrate and blocks. Transparency page sold me; the Discord is active too.
testimonials.t3_text: RollerCoin vibes but on Polygon. Lower noise, clearer wallet flow — I play Memory Sync daily.

games.title: Play games, earn mining power
games.subtitle: Log in to run sessions — powers are temporary and stack with your rigs.
games.g1_desc: Match crypto tiles fast — server grants timed hashrate boosts.
games.g2_desc: Chain combos on the board for bigger scores and rewards.
games.g3_desc: Watch approved videos and timed GPU sessions for extra H/s.

crypto.title: Withdraw in POL on Polygon
crypto.subtitle: Primary asset today is POL (Polygon). More assets may arrive later.
crypto.more: More networks & tokens may be added — follow announcements.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.heading: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: Yes. You can register, play, and earn without spending fiat. Shop purchases and some flows use in-game POL you earned or deposited.
faq.a2: Link a Polygon wallet, reach the minimum withdrawal shown in the Wallet page, and submit a request. Processing time depends on review load — often within 72 business hours for manual pipelines.
faq.a3: Hashrate decides your share of each simulated block round. More H/s versus the network means a larger slice of the round reward pool.
faq.a4: Yes — rigs, check-ins, faucet, shortlinks, referrals, YouTube, and Auto Mining all contribute. Games are optional boosts.
faq.a5: We use industry-standard practices for auth and APIs. Never share your seed phrase. For privacy rights (LGPD/GDPR), contact support through official channels.

final_cta.title: Ready to start mining?
final_cta.subtitle: Join thousands of players earning POL-style rewards — no credit card required.

closing.title: Your farm is one signup away.
closing.body: Create an account, explore the dashboard, and connect a wallet whenever you want real on-chain flows.

footer.tagline: Mine crypto. Play games. Earn rewards.
footer.disclaimer: Educational Web3 simulation — crypto involves risk; not financial advice.

footer.description: Public legal information for BlockMiner users and visitors.
footer.complianceNote: Public access supports GDPR and LGPD transparency requirements.

meta.title: Privacy Policy | BlockMiner
meta.description: How BlockMiner collects, uses, stores, shares, and protects personal data across blockminer.space and related services (GDPR, LGPD, and U.S. state privacy practices).

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.intro: This Privacy Policy describes how BlockMiner (“we”, “us”, “our”) processes personal data when you visit blockminer.space, use our web application, create an account, link a wallet, participate in gameplay, rewards, or referrals, or contact support. It is intended to meet transparency expectations under the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), the Brazilian Lei Geral de Proteção de Dados (LGPD), and common disclosure practices for U.S. state consumer privacy laws (including California) where applicable. If you do not agree, please discontinue use of the Services.

controllerContact.title: 1. Data controller, representative contacts, and scope
paragraphs: The data controller responsible for personal data processed through BlockMiner is the operating entity identified on the platform’s legal or transparency pages, doing business as BlockMiner. Contact for privacy matters is primarily through the official support channels published on blockminer.space (for example Discord, Telegram, or a published support email).

If we appoint a Data Protection Officer (DPO) or an EU/UK representative where required by law, we will publish their contact details in this section or on a linked compliance page. Until such appointment is published, privacy requests should be submitted through the same official support channels.

This policy applies to processing related to our website, authenticated application, APIs, customer support, security operations, fraud prevention, marketing communications (where used), and integrations with third-party wallet, payment, analytics, or infrastructure providers that we configure.
bullets: Controller identity: published on the platform (trade name BlockMiner).
Primary contact: official support channel listed on blockminer.space.

scopeDefinitions.title: 2. Definitions and roles
paragraphs: “Personal data” means information relating to an identified or identifiable individual. “Processing” includes collection, storage, use, disclosure, restriction, erasure, and similar operations. “You” means visitors and registered users.

Where we process personal data on behalf of another party as a processor, contractual terms govern that relationship; this policy describes our practices as controller for the BlockMiner product unless we state otherwise.

categoriesCollected.title: 3. Categories of personal data we process
paragraphs: We may process the following categories, depending on how you use the Services:
bullets: Account and profile: username, email address, password hash, referral or invitation codes, language preferences, and profile settings.
Security and session: authentication tokens, session identifiers, device/browser metadata, IP address, approximate location derived from IP, timestamps, anti-abuse signals, and audit logs.
Gameplay and economy: in-platform balances, mining or hashrate metrics, reward history, shop or inventory events, task completion records, and similar operational logs tied to your account.

Wallet and on-chain context: wallet addresses you connect or provide, chain identifiers, transaction references relevant to deposits/withdrawals, and risk-screening outcomes (we do not store private keys or seed phrases).
Support and communications: messages you send us, dispute details, and attachments you choose to provide.
Marketing (optional): email or in-product identifiers used for newsletters or promotions when you opt in.

purposesLegalBases.title: 4. Purposes of processing and legal bases (GDPR / UK GDPR)
paragraphs: Where GDPR or UK GDPR applies, we rely on one or more of the following legal bases: performance of a contract (Art. 6(1)(b)), legitimate interests (Art. 6(1)(f)), consent (Art. 6(1)(a)), and legal obligation (Art. 6(1)(c)). Where LGPD applies, we rely on compatible bases such as performance of services, compliance with legal obligations, legitimate interest, consent where required, and protection of credit or fraud prevention where applicable.

We process account and security data to create and maintain accounts, authenticate users, prevent fraud and abuse, enforce policies, and secure the platform—typically contract necessity and legitimate interests in security and integrity.

We process gameplay and economy data to operate features, calculate rewards, provide leaderboards or statistics where offered, and improve balancing—typically contract necessity and legitimate interests in product operation.

We process wallet-related data to facilitate optional deposits/withdrawals, reconcile transactions, and meet compliance obligations—typically contract necessity, legal obligation, and legitimate interests in fraud prevention.
We may send service messages (for example security alerts or policy updates) without marketing consent where permitted. Marketing messages require consent or another valid basis under local law.

cookiesIdentifiers.title: 5. Cookies, local storage, and similar technologies
paragraphs: We use cookies and similar technologies to maintain sessions, protect against CSRF and replay attacks, remember preferences, and measure basic product performance. Strictly necessary cookies may be placed without consent where required to deliver the service safely.

If we deploy non-essential analytics or advertising technologies, we will provide a consent mechanism where required by law (for example the ePrivacy Directive / national implementations) and describe choices in-product or via browser settings.
You can control cookies through your browser; disabling strictly necessary cookies may break sign-in or security features.

walletsBlockchain.title: 6. Wallet data, blockchain transparency, and third-party networks
paragraphs: Public blockchains are not controlled by BlockMiner. Wallet addresses and transaction details you broadcast may be visible on-chain indefinitely and processed by miners, indexers, and analytics providers independent of us.
We do not ask for seed phrases or private keys. Never share them with anyone claiming to represent support.
To reduce risk, use official in-app flows only, verify network and token details, and understand that mistaken transfers may be irreversible.

minors.title: 7. Children and minors
paragraphs: BlockMiner is not directed to children under the age required to enter a binding contract in their jurisdiction. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children below that age. If you believe a minor has provided data, contact us and we will take appropriate steps to delete or restrict processing, subject to law.

sources.title: 8. Sources of personal data
paragraphs: We collect data directly from you (forms, gameplay, wallet connections), automatically from your device and our servers (logs, telemetry needed for security), and occasionally from third parties such as fraud vendors, identity verification providers (if used), or advertising/attribution partners (if you consent).

recipients.title: 9. Recipients, processors, and onward transfers
paragraphs: We may disclose personal data to hosting and cloud providers, email and messaging services, database and monitoring tools, payment or wallet infrastructure partners, customer support platforms, analytics vendors (where permitted), professional advisers, and authorities when required by law.
We use contractual safeguards with processors (including data processing agreements) requiring confidentiality, security measures, and assistance with data subject requests where applicable.

internationalTransfers.title: 10. International transfers
paragraphs: We may process or store data in countries outside your own, including outside the European Economic Area (EEA), the UK, or Brazil. Where required, we implement appropriate safeguards such as Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs), UK Addendum, or other mechanisms recognized under applicable law.
You may request further information about safeguards by contacting us; copies may be redacted for confidentiality where permitted.

retentionSecurity.title: 11. Retention and security
paragraphs: We retain personal data only as long as necessary for the purposes described, including security, dispute resolution, and legal compliance. Criteria include account status, ongoing investigations, statutory limitation periods, and technical backup cycles. Aggregated or de-identified data may be retained longer.

We implement administrative, technical, and organizational measures designed to protect personal data, including access controls, encryption in transit where appropriate, logging, vulnerability management, and staff training. No method of transmission or storage is 100% secure.

breachesAutomation.title: 12. Personal data breaches and automated decision-making
paragraphs: We maintain internal procedures to detect, assess, and (where required) notify supervisory authorities and affected individuals about personal data breaches without undue delay.

We may use automated systems to score risk, detect cheating, or prioritize support. Where a decision produces legal or similarly significant effects solely by automated means, we will provide information required by law, including meaningful logic, significance, and your rights to human review where applicable.

rights.title: 13. Your privacy rights
paragraphs: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have rights to access, rectify, erase, restrict processing, object to certain processing, withdraw consent, data portability, and information about automated decisions. LGPD grants rights such as confirmation of processing, access, correction, anonymization/blocking, deletion, portability, information about sharing, and revocation of consent.
bullets: Access: request a copy or summary of personal data we hold about you.
Correction: request correction of inaccurate or incomplete data.
Deletion: request deletion subject to legal exceptions (for example retention for fraud prevention).
Restriction / objection: request restriction or object to processing based on legitimate interests or direct marketing.
Portability: receive structured data you provided where technically feasible.
Complaints: lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority (see Section 15).

marketingOptOut.title: 14. Marketing preferences and Do Not Track
paragraphs: You can opt out of marketing emails using unsubscribe links or by contacting support. Some jurisdictions grant rights to limit “sale” or “sharing” of personal information for cross-context behavioral advertising; where applicable, we will provide a clear mechanism or honor legally recognized global privacy control signals as required.
Unless required by law, we do not respond to “Do Not Track” browser signals as a uniform standard does not exist.

updatesComplaints.title: 15. Changes, complaints, and contact
paragraphs: We may update this Privacy Policy by posting a revised version and updating the “Last updated” date. Where changes are material and consent is required, we will seek consent or provide notice as required by law.

EU/EEA users may contact their local supervisory authority (for example a national DPA). UK users may contact the ICO. Brazilian users may contact the Autoridade Nacional de Proteção de Dados (ANPD). California residents may contact the California Privacy Protection Agency or pursue other rights under applicable law.

For privacy requests, contact official BlockMiner support with sufficient detail to verify your identity. We may request additional information to prevent fraudulent requests. We will respond within timelines required by applicable law (often within 30 days for GDPR/LGPD, subject to extensions where permitted).

meta.title: Terms of Use | BlockMiner
meta.description: Read the terms that govern access to and use of BlockMiner at blockminer.space.

termsOfUse.title: Terms of Use
termsOfUse.intro: These Terms of Use govern access to and use of BlockMiner, including the website and application available at blockminer.space and related services (together, the "Services"). By using the Services, you agree to these Terms and to our Privacy Policy.

generalProvisions.title: 1. General provisions
paragraphs: By using blockminer.space and the BlockMiner Services, you confirm that you have read these Terms of Use and our Privacy Policy, that you understand them, and that you unconditionally agree to be bound by them. You agree to comply with all applicable laws and regulations and are responsible for compliance with any local laws. This site and its content are protected by applicable copyright and intellectual property law. We reserve the right to refuse service to anyone without reason at any time, subject to applicable law.

This agreement regulates the legal relationship between the user of BlockMiner ("User") and the operator of the Services ("Administration", "we", "us", "our"). It describes basic rights and obligations and consequences of breach.

A User is a person who has reached the full legal age in their jurisdiction, who registers on the site (opens an account), and who has read and agreed to the Privacy Policy. You must be of legal age regardless of where you register or use the Services.

The account owner is the party who controls the password and email associated with the account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your password and account and are fully responsible for all activities under your account. You agree to: (a) immediately notify BlockMiner of any unauthorized use of your password or account or any other breach of security; and (b) ensure that you log out at the end of each session. BlockMiner cannot and will not be liable for any loss or damage arising from your failure to comply with this paragraph.

Subject to these Terms, you may use games and simulated mining mechanics, earn in-platform rewards, link a wallet for deposits and withdrawals where offered, and make optional in-game or in-platform purchases according to the rules published in the product.

Users found engaging in activities prohibited by this acceptable use policy may be subject to suspension, termination, forfeiture of abusive gains, and in extreme cases we may be legally obliged to report conduct to relevant authorities.

BlockMiner is a gaming and Web3-style simulation project. It must not be represented or treated as an investment platform, a financial instrument, guaranteed income, employment, or as software that performs real proof-of-work mining on external blockchain networks on your hardware without your explicit action.

You are solely responsible for ensuring that your use of BlockMiner is lawful in your jurisdiction. You must not use the Services for illegal or fraudulent purposes, including but not limited to money laundering, terrorist financing, sanctions evasion, and other financial crimes.
You must comply with all applicable laws and regulations related to cryptocurrency, digital assets, and blockchain technology where they apply to your use.
We reserve the right to request additional information, including identification documents, to verify identity and ensure compliance with applicable laws and fraud-prevention policies.
You are prohibited from using automated scripts, bots, or other software to interact with the Services unless we explicitly authorize it in writing or through a documented API or feature.

We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or terminate the Services, any feature, or these Terms at any time. Where required by law, we will provide notice or an effective date as described in the Amendments section.

To the fullest extent permitted by law, BlockMiner shall not be liable for damages or losses arising from your use of the Services, including but not limited to loss of profits, data, goodwill, or other intangible losses, except where liability cannot be excluded by mandatory law.
We may collect and process personal data in accordance with the Privacy Policy. You may exercise privacy rights by contacting our support team through official channels.

In-platform balances, hashrate, items, and rewards are governed by server-side rules and may be adjusted for fairness, economy balance, or compliance. Unless and until successfully withdrawn according to our procedures, such values do not represent a claim on us equivalent to a bank balance.
We reserve the right to change rules, multipliers, rewards, virtual items, and economy parameters at any time, including with or without prior notice where permitted by law.

useOfServicesAndConduct.title: 2. Use of services and rules of conduct
paragraphs: You must be authorized to use the Services for which you register, in accordance with these Terms and any additional terms shown in the product.

The Services are intended for personal, non-commercial entertainment unless we expressly agree otherwise in writing. You shall not sell, rent, or market the visual, audio, text, or other content on the Website ("Content") except as allowed by ordinary personal use; sell, rent, or purchase an existing BlockMiner account; reverse engineer, scrape at scale, or systematically extract Content; automate interactions except as permitted; or transfer Content outside normal personal use of the Services.

Where we allow downloads or printing, you must keep copyright and trademark notices intact, not redistribute Content except as part of ordinary use, and not use Content in a way that suggests false endorsement by BlockMiner.
If you copy or download any part of the Website in breach of these Terms, your right to use the Services may cease immediately and you must return or destroy copies as we direct.
You are solely responsible for damage caused to BlockMiner, partners, other users, or third parties by unlawful use or breach of these Terms.
If you provide information that is outdated, untrue, incomplete, or false, we may delete, suspend, or ban the account and restrict related communications channels.
You are solely responsible for material you upload, transmit, or publish through the Services and for having rights to any third-party works you include.

You may use the Services only for lawful purposes. You must not: breach applicable law; infringe intellectual property or privacy rights; harass, threaten, or discriminate against others; attempt unauthorized access to systems or accounts; interfere with or overload the Services; distribute malware; use cheats, hacks, unauthorized mods, or server emulators; impersonate others or use another user's account; phish or collect credentials; abuse support or reporting systems; harvest user directories; falsely claim to be our staff; or engage in spam, pyramid schemes, or unsolicited commercial mass messaging.

Harassment, hate speech, sexual content involving minors, glorification of violence, or content that threatens health and safety is strictly prohibited and may lead to immediate termination and law enforcement referral where appropriate.

You must not use the Services to facilitate illegal gambling, terrorism, narcotics or arms trafficking, or proliferation of weapons of mass destruction, or to support persons or entities subject to applicable sanctions, where such use is prohibited by law.
If we believe, in our sole discretion, that conduct is unfair or contrary to the spirit of the Services, we may disqualify, suspend, or terminate accounts and adjust balances tied to abuse.
We are not responsible for loss or damage from participating in the Services, withdrawal of features, or changes to these Terms, except where mandatory law provides otherwise.
We are not liable for disruptions, stoppages, or force majeure events outside our reasonable control.

personalDataConsent.title: 3. Personal data, marketing, and cookies
paragraphs: By using BlockMiner, you consent to the collection, processing, and storage of personal data as described in the Privacy Policy. Data may be used to provide and improve the Services, secure accounts, prevent fraud, and, where permitted, for marketing and service communications. You may withdraw marketing consent where applicable by contacting support or using unsubscribe tools we provide.

inactiveAccounts.title: 4. Inactive accounts
paragraphs: We may apply administrative policies to long-inactive accounts, including dormancy rules, inactivity fees, or closure, where permitted by law. Any such policy, including notice periods and amounts, will be described in the product or a supplementary policy page. If a policy provides notice, we will use reasonable efforts to communicate it through email or in-app messages before material changes take effect.

contentStandards.title: 5. Content standards
paragraphs: You may not create, share, or publish through the Services any material that we reasonably consider unlawful, threatening, defamatory, obscene, hateful, violent, discriminatory, or otherwise unacceptable.
You may not harass users, send unsolicited advertising, run unauthorized surveys or competitions, or use the Services for bulk spam.

monitoring.title: 6. Monitoring and moderation
paragraphs: We do not endorse user opinions, advice, or recommendations posted in public areas. Such content is the sole responsibility of the posting user.
We are not obligated to monitor all user content but may moderate, review, or remove content where appropriate for legal compliance, safety, or product integrity.
We may refuse usernames, display names, or passwords that violate policy, impersonate brands, or are otherwise inappropriate.

noProfessionalAdvice.title: 7. No investment, tax, or legal advice
paragraphs: BlockMiner does not provide investment, financial, tax, or legal advice. Website and in-app information is for general informational and entertainment purposes. You must conduct your own research and seek qualified professionals before making financial or legal decisions.
Nothing on BlockMiner constitutes a recommendation to buy, sell, or hold any digital asset, nor an endorsement of any third-party token, protocol, or project.

BlockMiner is not a registered investment adviser, broker-dealer, or tax adviser in any jurisdiction unless explicitly stated in writing for a specific regulated product, which does not describe the current game service.

userWarranties.title: 8. User warranties and indemnity
paragraphs: You warrant that you will not use BlockMiner to launder money or commit unlawful acts and that funds or assets you use comply with applicable anti-money laundering and sanctions rules.
You warrant that you will not offer bribes or improper advantages to public officials or third parties in connection with using the Services.

To the extent permitted by law, you agree to indemnify and hold harmless BlockMiner and its affiliates, directors, officers, and employees from claims, losses, and expenses (including reasonable attorneys' fees) arising from your breach of these Terms, your content, or your violation of third-party rights.

If you submit user-generated creative content where our features allow it, you represent that you have the rights needed to grant us a license to host and display that content for operating the Services.

intellectualProperty.title: 9. Intellectual property
paragraphs: Materials on the Website and in the application are owned by or licensed to BlockMiner and protected by copyright, trademark, and other laws.

Where competitions or features invite artwork or media, you grant BlockMiner a non-exclusive license to reproduce and display submissions for promotion and operation of the Services, as described in the relevant feature rules.

liability.title: 10. Limitation of liability
paragraphs: To the fullest extent permitted by law, BlockMiner is not liable for reliance on information on the site, for trading or wallet losses, or for on-chain transaction outcomes outside our reasonable control.
Rewards, estimates, and calculators are illustrative; they do not guarantee future payouts or POL market prices.

risksAndRestrictions.title: 11. Crypto risks and geographic restrictions
paragraphs: Digital assets can be volatile, experimental, and subject to regulatory change. You may lose value when sending assets on-chain. You alone bear responsibility for wallet security, seed phrases, and network fees.

Information about digital assets may be incomplete or inaccurate. Consult regulators in your jurisdiction. Examples of public investor guidance include materials published by the U.S. SEC, UK FCA, EU ESMA, and comparable authorities; links and lists may change and are not exhaustive.

We may refuse registration or service to persons located in comprehensively sanctioned countries or regions, or where required by applicable trade sanctions and export control laws. Restricted locations may change without notice. It is your duty not to use the Services if you are prohibited from doing so.
Tokens or in-game representations are not deposits insured by government schemes unless explicitly stated otherwise in a separate regulated offering.

payments.title: 12. Payments, wallets, and withdrawals
paragraphs: Deposits, withdrawals, and certain purchases may involve blockchain networks (for example Polygon and POL as described in the product). We do not own or control public blockchains, wallets, or third-party RPC providers.
On-chain transactions may be irreversible. If you send crypto using the wrong network, token, or address, funds may be lost. You are responsible for verifying addresses and networks.
We may not have visibility into or control over third-party wallet transactions and generally cannot reverse on-chain transfers.
You are responsible for taxes associated with your use of the Services, excluding taxes on our net income, as required by your jurisdiction.
Network and processing fees charged by third parties are your responsibility unless we state otherwise for a specific product.
You must protect access to your account to prevent theft of balances or credentials.
Purchases or deposits may be non-refundable where you breach material rules in Sections 2 and 5, or where digital delivery has occurred, subject to mandatory consumer rights in your country.
We may review withdrawals for fraud prevention and compliance. Processing times depend on internal queues and risk checks and may take several business days.
We may temporarily freeze balances for investigation when legally permitted or when required to protect the platform.
You may withdraw only available balances shown in the product after meeting published minimums and verification requirements.

referralProgram.title: 13. Referral program
paragraphs: Referral terms (including cookie duration, attribution, and commission structure) are defined in the referral section of the product and may change. "Referrer" means a user who shares a referral link; "Referral" means a new user attributed under program rules.
Self-referrals, circular referrals, artificial purchases to generate commissions, or misuse of referral mechanics may result in permanent suspension and reversal of abusive rewards.
We may remove referrals or adjust statistics if we detect fraud or policy violations.

thirdPartyAndAdvertising.title: 14. Third-party sites and advertising
paragraphs: The Services may link to third-party websites or display third-party content. We do not control and are not responsible for third-party terms, privacy practices, or accuracy. Your use of third-party services is at your own risk.
If we display advertisements, advertisers are responsible for their ads and offers. We provide placement only unless we explicitly state that we are the seller of a specific item.

amendments.title: 15. Amendments
paragraphs: We may modify these Terms or related policies by publishing a revised version on the website. The revised version becomes effective on the earlier of: (a) your first use of the Services after publication; or (b) the effective date stated in the notice, or if none is stated, fifteen (15) days after publication, where required by applicable law.

finalProvisions.title: 19. Final provisions
paragraphs: These Terms remain in effect while you use the Services. We may deny access, including blocking IP addresses, or terminate accounts without notice where permitted by law, including for breach of these Terms or applicable law.
If your account is terminated, you must not create a new account to evade enforcement, including using false or third-party identities.
We are not responsible for losses from unauthorized access to your account caused by your failure to secure credentials or devices, except where mandatory law states otherwise.
For technical issues, contact support through official channels. We will use commercially reasonable efforts to respond within a reasonable time; specific SLAs may be published separately.
If any provision of these Terms is held invalid, the remaining provisions remain enforceable to the maximum extent. Our failure to enforce a provision is not a waiver.

These Terms, together with the Privacy Policy and any feature-specific rules we publish, constitute the entire agreement regarding the subject matter and supersede prior oral or written understandings on the same topic, except where mandatory law requires otherwise.

contact.title: 20. Contact
paragraphs: For questions about these Terms of Use, contact BlockMiner through the official support channel published on blockminer.space (for example Discord, Telegram, or email if listed there).

electronicCommunications.title: 16. Electronic communications, records, and signatures
paragraphs: You agree that we may send you notices, receipts, agreements, and policy updates electronically through the email associated with your account, in-product messages, or posted notices on blockminer.space.

You are responsible for keeping your email address accurate. Electronic records maintained by our systems may be used as evidence of transactions, consents, and account activity, subject to applicable law and authentication requirements.

governingLawDisputes.title: 17. Governing law, venue, informal dispute resolution, and class actions
paragraphs: Unless mandatory consumer law in your country requires otherwise, these Terms and the Privacy Policy are governed by the laws designated in our published corporate disclosures or, if none are published, by the laws of the jurisdiction where the operating entity is established, without regard to conflict-of-law rules that would require another jurisdiction’s laws.

You agree to first contact support and attempt to resolve disputes informally in good faith for at least thirty (30) days before initiating formal proceedings, where such a requirement is enforceable under applicable law.

To the fullest extent permitted by law, disputes must be brought on an individual basis and not as a plaintiff or class member in any purported class, collective, or representative proceeding. If you are a consumer in a jurisdiction that prohibits such waivers, this subsection applies only to the extent permitted.

regulatoryCompliancePrograms.title: 18. Sanctions, export controls, and compliance programs
paragraphs: You represent that you are not identified on any government restricted-party list and that you will not use the Services to violate trade sanctions, export controls, or anti-boycott rules applicable to you or to BlockMiner.

We may screen activity, block access, freeze features, or terminate accounts where required by law or where we reasonably believe a transaction or user presents sanctions, fraud, or illicit finance risk.
Nothing in these Terms obliges us to process a withdrawal, payment, or transfer that we reasonably believe would violate applicable law.

maintenance.title: Platform in BETA
maintenance.message: We are performing system maintenance and improvements. Temporary instabilities may occur. Thank you for your patience.

errors.termsRequired: You must accept the Terms of Use before creating an account.

login.subtitle: Sign in to continue building your mining empire.

errors.identifier_not_found: Email or username does not exist.

register.privacyDisclosure: Registration requires acceptance of the Terms of Use. Privacy details are available publicly at any time.

termsConsent.helpText: You can open the legal page before creating your account.

errors.password_min: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.username_too_short: Username must be at least 3 characters.
errors.username_too_long: Username must be 24 characters or fewer.
errors.username_invalid: Username can only contain letters, numbers, periods, underscores, and hyphens.

errors.registration_limit_reached: Registration limit reached for this connection.

minigame.title: Hash Tap Sprint
minigame.subtitle: Tap the highlighted tile as fast as you can. Your reward is unlocked when the server round ends (69 seconds). A 3-minute cooldown applies after each reward.
minigame.instructions_idle: Start a round when the button is available. The server tracks time — finish the full window to claim.
minigame.instructions_play: Tap the glowing cell. Each hit raises your streak (for fun). Missing slightly lowers streak.
minigame.server_sync_hint: Reward is granted automatically when the countdown reaches zero (validated on the server).
minigame.last_win: Last reward: +{{hr}} H/s for {{days}} days. Next play in {{cd}}.

errors.start_failed: Could not start the round. Try again.
errors.complete_failed: Could not claim the reward. Try again.
errors.cooldown_active: Cooldown active — wait before starting another round.
errors.COOLDOWN_ACTIVE: Cooldown active — wait before starting another round.
errors.TOO_EARLY: The round is not finished yet (server time).
errors.SESSION_EXPIRED: This round has expired. Start a new one when cooldown allows.
errors.SESSION_NOT_ACTIVE: This round is no longer active.

liveServer.title: Live server pulse
liveServer.subtitle: Aggregated POL flows and community size for streams, OBS overlays, and social proof. No personal data — totals only.
liveServer.load_error: Could not load live stats. Try again in a moment.
liveServer.footer: BlockMiner · figures are approximate system totals · not financial advice

admin_user_sidebar.title: User app sidebar
admin_user_sidebar.subtitle: Control visibility, order, and whether Earn items sit under Rewards or at the top of Earn. Paths and labels are fixed for security.

admin_daily_tasks.title: Daily tasks
admin_daily_tasks.subtitle: Turn tasks on or off and change their order. The check-in daily task is hidden from users when the Check-in sidebar link is disabled.
admin_daily_tasks.load_error: Could not load daily task definitions.
admin_daily_tasks.empty: No definitions found. Run database migrations.
admin_daily_tasks.crud_hint: Use New task to add a definition. Use Delete on a row to remove it permanently (all user progress for that task is cleared).
admin_daily_tasks.create_hint: Add matching keys under dailyTasks.tasks.* in locale JSON so the user sees a title.
admin_daily_tasks.create_internal_offerwall_offer_id: Internal offerwall offer ID (optional, scopes progress to one offer)
admin_daily_tasks.delete_confirm: Delete task "{{slug}}"? All user progress rows for this task will be removed.

miniPass.title: Mini Pass
miniPass.subtitle: Seasonal missions, XP tiers, and exclusive rewards

dailyTasks.title: Daily Tasks
dailyTasks.empty: No daily tasks are configured right now.
dailyTasks.subtitle: Complete objectives every day and claim rewards. Progress resets at midnight (Brazil time).

tasks.login: Check in today (confirm your daily check-in)
tasks.mine_blk: Earn {{target}} BLK from the BLK time pool today

readEarn.title: Read & Earn
readEarn.subtitle: Open partner articles, find the secret code, and claim rewards once per campaign.
readEarn.empty: No active partner campaigns right now. Check back soon.
readEarn.code_placeholder: Enter the code from the article
readEarn.success_hint: Your reward has been added to your account.
readEarn.error_unavailable: This code cannot be redeemed. Check the article, dates, or try again later.
readEarn.error_claimed: You have already claimed this campaign.

adminReadEarn.title: Read & Earn campaigns
adminReadEarn.subtitle: Create partner article campaigns and monitor redemptions.
adminReadEarn.migration_pending: Database migration required. Apply Prisma migrations on the server.
adminReadEarn.confirm_delete: Delete this campaign? Only allowed if there are zero redemptions.
adminReadEarn.code_optional_placeholder: New code (optional — leave blank to keep current)

internalOfferwallPage.title: internal offerwall
internalOfferwallPage.subtitle: Complete partner tasks managed by BlockMiner. Paid views open the partner site in a new tab. Rewards are credited by our servers.
internalOfferwallPage.empty: No partner tasks are available right now. Check back later.
internalOfferwallPage.general_started_hint: Complete the task described above. Keep this page open until the timer finishes, then submit.
internalOfferwallPage.min_view_hint: Keep this tab open at least {{seconds}} seconds before submitting.
internalOfferwallPage.min_view_zero_hint: You can submit as soon as you are done.
internalOfferwallPage.countdown_ready: Time is up — you can submit now.
internalOfferwallPage.ptc_new_window_hint: The partner page opens in a new tab. Complete the steps there, then return here and submit after the timer.
internalOfferwallPage.popup_blocked: The new tab was blocked. Allow pop-ups for this site or tap the button below to open the partner page.
internalOfferwallPage.daily_limit: You reached today's limit for this offer.
internalOfferwallPage.inactive_or_missing: This task is not available or has been deactivated.

admin_internal_offerwall.title: Internal offerwall
admin_internal_offerwall.subtitle: Create PTC offers (partner page opens in a new tab for users) and general tasks. Link them to daily tasks via the Daily Tasks admin (task type INTERNAL_OFFERWALL).
admin_internal_offerwall.form_iframe_url: Partner page URL (PTC only, opens in new tab)
admin_internal_offerwall.form_external_info_url: External info URL (general tasks only, allowlisted host)
admin_internal_offerwall.validation_title_too_long: Title must be at most 200 characters.
admin_internal_offerwall.validation_min_view_range: Minimum view seconds must be between 0 and 7200.
admin_internal_offerwall.validation_daily_limit_range: Daily limit per user must be between 1 and 50.
admin_internal_offerwall.validation_iframe_required: Enter a valid https partner URL for PTC offers (host is registered on the server when you save).
admin_internal_offerwall.validation_iframe_invalid: Iframe URL is not a valid URL.
admin_internal_offerwall.validation_iframe_https: Iframe URL must use http or https.
admin_internal_offerwall.validation_iframe_host: Iframe URL must include a valid public hostname (not localhost).
admin_internal_offerwall.error_iframe_not_allowed: The iframe host "{{host}}" could not be allowlisted automatically. Check the hostname and try again, or remove the frame host in admin if it was disabled.
admin_internal_offerwall.error_iframe_host_invalid: That iframe hostname is not allowed (invalid format, localhost, or IP address).
admin_internal_offerwall.validation_external_url_invalid: External info URL is invalid or missing a valid hostname.
admin_internal_offerwall.validation_reward_blk_positive: BLK reward must be a positive number.
admin_internal_offerwall.validation_reward_pol_positive: POL reward must be a positive number.
admin_internal_offerwall.validation_reward_hr_positive: Hashrate reward must be a positive number.
admin_internal_offerwall.validation_reward_days_range: Hashrate days must be between 1 and 365.
admin_internal_offerwall.validation_action_line_too_long: Each required action line must be at most 500 characters.
admin_internal_offerwall.validation_country_iso2: Country codes must be ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 (two letters), comma or space separated.

dashboard_crypto_stream.title: BlockMiner — Crypto dashboard
dashboard_crypto_stream.subtitle: Public live snapshot for stream capture (no login).

admin_streaming.title: Live streaming (RTMP)
admin_streaming.subtitle: Capture a web page and push RTMP to YouTube Live, Twitch, or any compatible ingest. Add destinations, then start or stop each stream.
admin_streaming.hint_linux: Requires Linux with ffmpeg, Xvfb, and Playwright on the server. Stream keys are encrypted with STREAM_ENCRYPTION_KEY (64 hex chars) on the API host.
admin_streaming.hint_kiosk: The capture browser runs in kiosk mode (fullscreen, no tabs or address bar). Default RTMP URL is /crypto-broadcast/ (public crypto board, no login). In the app, /dashboardcrypto opens the same board inside the SPA.
admin_streaming.hint_auto_resume: If the API process restarts or ffmpeg stops while a destination is still set to run, the worker retries automatically with backoff (then stops with an error until you press Start).
admin_streaming.hint_encryption: Add STREAM_ENCRYPTION_KEY to the server environment (e.g. merge via deploy.secrets.local — see docs/DEPLOYMENT.md). Example: openssl rand -hex 32
admin_streaming.error_encryption_key: The server is missing STREAM_ENCRYPTION_KEY (64 hex characters). Add it to .env on the VM or to deploy.secrets.local for Windows deploy, then redeploy.
admin_streaming.empty: No destinations yet. Add one with your ingest URL and stream key.
admin_streaming.confirm_delete: Delete this destination and stop any active stream?
admin_streaming.form_stream_key: RTMP stream key (YouTube / Twitch / etc., stored encrypted)
admin_streaming.form_data_api_key: Platform API key (optional, e.g. YouTube Data API, encrypted at rest)

support_tickets.title: Support
support_tickets.subtitle: Open a ticket and chat with our team in real time.
support_tickets.empty_list: You have no tickets yet. Create one to get help.
support_tickets.select_prompt: Select a ticket from the list or create a new one.
support_tickets.validation_profile: Your profile must include name and email.
support_tickets.attachment_open_full: Open full size in a new tab
support_tickets.attachment_failed: Image could not be loaded. Open link to try in a new tab.

admin_support.title: Support tickets
admin_support.subtitle: Manage user requests with live updates.
admin_support.select_hint: Choose a ticket from the list to view the thread.

dossier.error_refresh: Could not refresh this section. You can retry.
dossier.not_linked: This ticket is not linked to a game account. Only the name and email on the ticket are available.
dossier.orphan_user: The ticket is linked to a user id that no longer exists in the database.

dashboard.subtitle: Your mining operation is active. Track next block rewards in real-time.
dashboard.no_blocks: Waiting for the first network block...
dashboard.efficiency_msg: Your mining efficiency is 100%. Keep your machines active.

shop.title: Expand your Operation
shop.subtitle: Purchase state-of-the-art equipment and increase your HashRate to mine blocks more efficiently.
shop.confirm_purchase: Do you really want to buy this miner?
shop.how_it_works_msg: When purchasing a miner, it is sent automatically to your inventory. You must install it in a free rack in your data center to start generating POL. Each miner consumes space and energy, make sure you have infrastructure available.

inventory.title: Mining Room
inventory.subtitle: Manage your equipment and maximize your HashRate.
inventory.buy_miners_msg: Buy miners in the shop to get started.
inventory.tip_msg: Tip: Click a free slot to install a machine from your inventory. Elite machines occupy 2 slots.
inventory.backpack_qty_hint: This sends one unit. Other copies stay in inventory ({{count}} left after).
inventory.backpack_help: Use Send to warehouse to store a unit in the vault without installing it.
inventory.max_rooms: You have already unlocked all available rooms.
inventory.insufficient_balance: Insufficient balance to unlock this room.

modal.confirm_remove: Do you want to send this machine back to inventory?
modal.remove_warning: This will send the machine back to inventory and free the rack.
modal.remove_options_intro: Free the rack and send the machine to your inventory (ready to reinstall) or to the warehouse (stored, not mining).
modal.choose_machine: Choose a machine to install in this slot:

inventory.dismantle_rack_tooltip: Remove all machines from this rack to inventory
inventory.dismantle_rack_aria: Dismantle entire rack and send all machines to inventory
inventory.dismantle_rack_confirm: Do you want to dismantle rack {{rack}}?
inventory.dismantle_rack_warning: This will remove all installed machines from this rack and send them back to your inventory.
inventory.slot_empty_tooltip: Empty slot — open to install a machine from inventory

wallet.blk_locked_line: Locked (legacy): {{amount}} BLK — contact support if needed.
wallet.title: Digital Wallet
wallet.subtitle: Manage your funds and perform On-chain withdrawals.
wallet.withdraw_subtitle: Send your POL directly to your on-chain wallet.
wallet.processing_time: Processing time: Up to {{hours}} business hours.
wallet.invalid_address: Please enter a valid Polygon wallet address (0x...).
wallet.tip_deposit: Deposits are processed instantly after 1 confirmation on the Polygon network.
wallet.deposit_verify_msg: The system verifies on the blockchain in the background. You can close this page — credit is automatic.
wallet.ticket_hint: Deposited POL but balance didn't update? Open a ticket with your transaction hash. Our team will verify on-chain and credit manually.
wallet.ticket_invalid_wallet: Enter a valid Polygon wallet address (0x…).
wallet.ticket_open_success: Support ticket opened. We will review your transaction.

deposit_options.hint: Choose how you connect your wallet, then sign the POL transfer.
deposit_options.contract_required: Smart contract deposit is not available in this environment. Use WalletConnect with the treasury address or contact support.
deposit_options.walletconnect_hint: Open WalletConnect to scan the QR code on your phone, stay on Polygon (137), then use Express deposit to sign.

web3_deposit.title: Polygon POL deposit
web3_deposit.hint: Open the wallet picker (WalletConnect on mobile or extension on desktop), stay on Polygon (137). Then use Express deposit to sign sending POL — the server credits after on-chain confirmations.
web3_deposit.express_safety: You sign the transfer in your wallet to the platform address. Send only POL on Polygon; other assets may be lost.
web3_deposit.wc_missing_build: No VITE_WALLETCONNECT_PROJECT_ID — WalletConnect will not open on phones. Add it to deploy.secrets.local (merged on deploy) or .env.production.vm-backup, then redeploy.
web3_deposit.disconnect_to_switch: Disconnect your wallet first to choose another account or connection method.
web3_deposit.hint_disconnect_for_contract: WalletConnect is still active. Tap «Connect wallet» below to switch to the browser extension — the WalletConnect session is closed automatically. You can also disconnect first using the button in this section or in the header.
web3_deposit.hint_disconnect_for_wc: You are connected with the browser wallet. Disconnect first, then use WalletConnect (QR) if you prefer.
web3_deposit.link_prompt: Connect and sign the message to link your wallet to this account.
web3_deposit.waiting_hint: After you send POL, status and confirmation progress update below while verification runs.
web3_deposit.no_treasury: Treasury address is not configured on the server (DEPOSIT_WALLET_ADDRESS).
web3_deposit.no_wallet_for_send: No wallet session. Connect a browser wallet or WalletConnect first.
web3_deposit.no_browser_wallet: No browser wallet found. On your phone use WalletConnect (with VITE_WALLETCONNECT_PROJECT_ID set), or open this site inside MetaMask / Trust in-app browser.
web3_deposit.injected_unusable: A browser extension is blocking Ethereum (e.g. Bitwarden). Disable it for this site or pick MetaMask / another wallet. On mobile, use WalletConnect.
web3_deposit.switch_chain_unsupported: This wallet does not support automatic network switch. Open your wallet and select Polygon (chain 137) manually.
web3_deposit.smart_contract_hint: Use WalletConnect or a browser wallet on Polygon (137). Link the same wallet to your profile, then send POL through the on-chain deposit contract — the server credits your balance after confirmations.
web3_deposit.treasury_browser_hint: Use a browser wallet (e.g. Rabby, MetaMask) on Polygon (137). Connect and sign the link message, then use Express deposit to send native POL to the platform treasury address — the server credits after confirmations.
web3_deposit.no_deposit_config: Deposits are not configured on the server (set SMART_CONTRACT_ADDRESS and/or DEPOSIT_WALLET_ADDRESS).
web3_deposit.link_wallet_required_contract: Link your connected wallet to this account (sign the verification message) before using the smart-contract deposit.
web3_deposit.tx_requesting: Requesting transaction approval in your wallet…
web3_deposit.deposit_success_registered: Deposit registered. Verification runs in the background — you can safely leave this page.
web3_deposit.connect_wallet_failed: Could not connect the wallet. Please try again.
web3_deposit.insufficient_funds: Insufficient POL for the amount plus network gas.

wallet.express_mode_note: EXPRESS: Link your wallet to sign transfers on Polygon. Balance updates after {{n}} block confirmations.

faucet.title: Equipment Faucet
faucet.subtitle: Earn free miners every 60 minutes. Complete the partner step to unlock your prize.
faucet.cooldown_msg: You have already collected your prize recently. Come back when the timer reaches zero to win again.
faucet.partner_msg: Click the banner below to visit our sponsor and unlock your reward.
faucet.partner_click_hint: Tap the sponsor area to continue
faucet.partner_new_tab_hint: The sponsor opens in a new tab
faucet.partner_toast_started: Sponsor opened in a new tab. Keep it open for a few seconds.
faucet.how_it_works_msg: To keep the pool free, we ask you to visit our sponsors. Click the banner, keep the site open for a few seconds, and the claim button will activate automatically.

shortlinks.title: Shortlinks
shortlinks.subtitle: Complete shortened links to earn extra mining power.
shortlinks.wait_reset: Come back tomorrow after daily reset.
shortlinks.reset_in: Next link will be available in:
shortlinks.shortlink_msg: Shortlinks are third-party links that generate revenue for the pool, allowing us to distribute free miners. You must pass through some verification pages (captchas) to complete the link. Upon completion, mining power is added instantly to your inventory.

checkin.title: Daily Check-in
checkin.subtitle: Send the POL payment on Polygon to the official address. The server verifies on-chain — you can leave and come back later.
checkin.reset_in: Your next bonus will be available in:
checkin.link_wallet_hint: Link and verify your wallet on the Wallet page to use check-in.
checkin.link_wallet_first: Link your wallet on the Wallet page first.
checkin.failed_retry: Last attempt failed. Send a new payment or tap “Complete check-in” after fixing.
checkin.unavailable: Check-in is unavailable on the server.
checkin.status_degraded: Check-in data could not be loaded (database is updating).
checkin.status_degraded_hint: Wait a minute and refresh the page. If this persists, contact support.
checkin.come_back: Come back tomorrow to keep your streak.
checkin.milestones_sub: Rewards are granted automatically when your streak reaches each day — after a successful daily check-in.
checkin.subtitle_free: Your streak and history are stored on the server. One check-in per calendar day (America/São Paulo).
checkin.free_hint: No POL payment — one tap per day keeps your streak.
checkin.server_note_free: When you reopen the site, streak and history load from the database.
checkin.server_note: The server validates amount, recipient, and sender on-chain. Pending transactions are rechecked automatically in the background.
checkin.error_already_today: You have already checked in today. Come back tomorrow.
checkin.error_balance_insufficient: Not enough POL balance for this check-in (0.02 POL required).
checkin.error_balance_failed: Balance check-in could not be completed. Try again or use the wallet option.
checkin.wallet_only_hint: Send 0.01 POL from your connected wallet; the server verifies on-chain.
checkin.internal_balance_vs_wallet_hint: "Balance" uses POL on your BlockMiner account (deposits and in-app rewards). It does not use your browser wallet balance. Choose "Wallet" to send 0.01 POL from your connected wallet on Polygon.

payment_options.title: Choose Payment Method
payment_options.wallet_desc: Send 0.01 POL from your connected wallet
payment_options.balance_desc: Deduct 0.02 POL from your in-game balance

errors.insufficient_balance: Insufficient balance. You need at least 0.02 POL to check-in with balance.
errors.wallet_not_connected: Wallet not connected. Please connect your wallet first.
errors.already_checked_in: Already checked in today. Come back tomorrow!
errors.verification_failed: Payment verification failed. Please contact support if this persists.

success.wallet_checkin: Check-in confirmed via wallet! +{{streak}} day streak
success.balance_checkin: Check-in confirmed via balance! +{{streak}} day streak

streak_info.streak_reset_warning: Missing a day will reset your streak to 0

powerStats.title: Statistics & Power
powerStats.subtitle: See every source of your hashrate, what is permanent vs temporary, and when boosts expire — so a drop in total power never feels mysterious.
powerStats.load_error: Could not load power statistics. Try again.
powerStats.total_tooltip: Sum of rack machines plus all active temporary boosts.
powerStats.permanent_tooltip: Hashrate from machines installed in your rack (while active).
powerStats.temporary_tooltip: YouTube, minigames, check-in bonuses, Auto Mining GPU — each row expires.
powerStats.no_active_temporary: No active temporary boosts right now.
powerStats.projection_permanent: Permanent baseline stays near {{hr}} H/s while machines stay active.
powerStats.projection_temporary: Temporary layer is {{hr}} H/s until individual expiry times.
powerStats.projection_hint_check_expiry: Watch the countdowns — when temporary power expires, total drops only by that slice.
powerStats.projection_hint_machines: Buying or activating more machines raises the permanent (green) portion.
powerStats.projection_hint_minigames: Minigames and daily check-in add amber boosts with clear expiry dates.

checkin.title: Daily check-in
checkin.bonus_note: Streak milestone hashrate appears as temporary game power until it expires.

other.title: Referrals & events
other.note: Referral or staking hashrate is not stored as a separate bucket in this version. Only real rows in your account are shown above.

network.title: Your rank

network.your_share: Your share of that pool snapshot: {{pct}}%

payout.title: Payout mode (not split hashrate)
payout.pol_note: Your hashrate earns POL-style rewards through the main mining flow.
payout.blk_note: When enabled, eligible users share BLK cycles using the same total hashrate snapshot.

analytics.title: Mining log analytics (approximate)
analytics.disclaimer: Values come from mining reward logs (share of simulated block), not a perfect H/s history.

charts.mining_share_note: Each point is the average of your logged share% for that UTC day.
charts.blk_pool_note: Shows recent cycle snapshots (pool hashrate), not your personal curve.

youtube.title: YouTube Rewards
youtube.subtitle: Watch videos from our community and earn HashRate or POL.
youtube.no_videos: No videos available at the moment.
youtube.invalid_url: Invalid YouTube URL or unsupported format.
youtube.video_loaded: Video loaded! Earnings start when you press play.
youtube.embed_hint_before: If Error 153 appears, the creator blocked embed. Click
youtube.embed_hint_after: to watch there and earn normally.

offers.title: Popular Offers
offers.subtitle: Exclusive event miners. Pay with your in-game balance — items go to your inventory.
offers.empty: No active offers right now. Check back soon.
offers.collect_free_desc: You are collecting this machine for free.
offers.confirm_limited_desc: You are about to acquire a limited-time event machine.
offers.confirm_note: The amount will be debited from your balance. The miner appears in Inventory for installation.

calculator.results_placeholder: Fill in your hash rate and network hash rate to calculate
calculator.notes_estimate: Estimate does not account for network fluctuations

minerGames.temporary_power_tooltip: Hash rate earned from Arena minigames (Memory Sync, Power Match). It expires after the configured duration and does not replace rack machines.

minerGames.memory_sync_desc: Match coin pairs at high speed.
minerGames.power_match_desc: Chain cascades by swapping adjacent assets.

game_finish.anti_cheat_timing: Suspicious action detected: play time was unrealistically short.

game_reward.short_term: +50 H/s bonus active for 24 hours! Check in to unlock up to {{days}} days.

autoMiningGpuPage.title: Auto Mining GPU
autoMiningGpuPage.subtitle: Earn temporary hashrate every minute. The server validates timing — keep this page open for best results.
autoMiningGpuPage.mode_hint: Choose once per session. Stop the session to change mode.
autoMiningGpuPage.mode_turbo_desc: +20 H/s every 60 seconds after you open the partner banner in a new tab.
autoMiningGpuPage.pause_hint: Timer pauses while the tab is in the background.
autoMiningGpuPage.daily_limit_note: Resets at UTC midnight. Combined Normal + Turbo.

autoMiningGpuPage.claim_turbo_hint: Open the partner link first, then claim here.

autoMiningGpuPage.legacy_note: Legacy GPU claims (if any) still appear in your total hashrate until they expire.

transparency.page_description: All site expenses open to the community: infrastructure, tooling, marketing and where money is invested.
transparency.footer_note: Values in USD. Period conversions are estimates. Manually updated by the BlockMiner team.

vault.title: Miner Vault
vault.subtitle: Securely store your miners away from the main interface.
vault.empty_hint: Move miners here from your inventory to hide them from the main view.
vault.move_error: Failed to move machine to vault.

vault.confirm_retrieve_desc: This will return the machine to your inventory.

errors.VAULT_UNAVAILABLE: Could not complete vault storage. Try again in a moment.

adminAuth.session_invalid: Your admin session expired or is invalid. Please sign in again.
adminAuth.session_banner: You were signed out of the admin panel. Sign in again to continue.

adminMiniPass.workflow_hint: Save the season first, then configure level rewards and missions below — miners, POL, XP, and game missions are added step by step for each tier.
